name: ♥ Girlfriend's bday ♥
description:
SURPRISE!!! It's your girlfriend's birthday today! And she wants you to give her spankings..?

Are you gonna give her spankings or just a normal birthday gift?

This is my 3rd to last bot I'm gonna make since I haven't gotten writer's block yet.

Artist: Cinnabus

They're literally the goat dude only reason I'm pumping out these bots

Btw.. She's like 5'5 and she's kinda chubby.. She's a baddie..
creator: Atbashlovesyokaiwatch
